name: ElasticsearchConnector
description: Connects to Elasticsearch (self-hosted or Elastic Cloud) to manage indices, index and search documents (full DSL), run bulk operations (NDJSON), maintain mappings, and inspect aliases + snapshots. Authenticates via Kibana-issued API keys, HTTP Basic, or anonymous self-hosted clusters. Streams JSON for all single-document endpoints and application/x-ndjson for /_bulk. Per-tenant cluster URL — every tenant brings their own base_url.

install_fields.label: Cluster URL
install_fields.help: Full URL — Elastic Cloud (https://*.cloud.es.io:9243) or self-hosted (https://es.internal:9200). Per-tenant, no default.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste the encoded API key from Kibana
install_fields.help: Generate from Kibana → Stack Management → API Keys. Preferred over basic auth. Sent as 'Authorization: ApiKey <key>' (NOT Bearer). Leave blank for anonymous self-hosted clusters.

install_fields.label: Username
install_fields.help: HTTP Basic fallback — required only if not using api_key.

install_fields.label: Password
install_fields.placeholder: Enter the password for the user above

install_fields.label: Verify TLS
install_fields.help: Disable only for self-signed dev clusters — never in production.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft client-side rate limit. Elasticsearch's hard limit depends on cluster sizing and circuit breakers.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates base_url and probes GET / to verify reachability, then persists config.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probes GET /_cluster/health — returns even on yellow/red status (DEGRADED instead of OFFLINE).

apis.name: Get Cluster Health
apis.description: GET /_cluster/health?level=… — green/yellow/red status, shard counts, node counts.

apis.name: List Indices
apis.description: GET /_cat/indices/{pattern}?format=json — list indices matching a glob.

apis.name: Get Index
apis.description: GET /{index} — full index info (settings + mappings + aliases).

apis.name: Create Index
apis.description: PUT /{index} — create index with optional settings and mappings.

apis.name: Search
apis.description: POST /{index}/_search — execute a query DSL with size, from, sort, and aggs.

apis.name: Bulk
apis.description: POST /_bulk — paired action+source NDJSON. Caller supplies the paired list; the client serialises and sets Content-Type=application/x-ndjson.

apis.name: Count
apis.description: POST /{index}/_count — count documents (optionally filtered by query).

apis.name: Put Mapping
apis.description: PUT /{index}/_mapping — add or update field mappings.

apis.name: List Aliases
apis.description: GET /_cat/aliases[/{name}]?format=json — list aliases for an index or globally.

apis.name: List Snapshots
apis.description: GET /_snapshot/{repository}/_all — list snapshots in a repository.
